description: Double-entry ledger plugin for cross-scope accounting. Provides idempotent transaction posting, reversal, multi-currency support, and account management. Product-agnostic — no billing or finance semantics built in.

defaultCurrency.description: Default ISO-4217 currency code used when a transaction does not specify one. Defaults to 'USD'.

idempotencyWindowHours.description: Hours within which duplicate transaction IDs are detected and deduplicated. Defaults to 24.

enableReversalChain.description: Whether reversal entries are linked to their originating entries for chain traceability. Defaults to true.
